name: daniel-portfolio
description: Adegbuyi Daniel - Virtual Assistant & Front-End Developer Portfolio

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); if (!fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.mkdirSync('dist'); fs.copyFileSync('index.html', 'dist/index.html'); const files = fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f => f.endsWith('.png')); files.forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(f, path.join('dist', f)))"

author: Adegbuyi Daniel
